zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II, Count Honstein於大約1226年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 皮爾納霍韓斯坦時，他的父親Dietrich I von Honstein36歲，母親Heilwig Sophie von Brehna18歲。他於1253年與Mechtild von Regenstein結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年1月24日享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II, Count Honstein于大约1226年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 皮爾納霍韓斯坦时，他的父亲Dietrich I von Honstein36岁，母亲Heilwig Sophie von Brehna18岁。他于1253年与Mechtild von Regenstein结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年1月24日享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Honstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from a place so named near Dresden.

variants.name: Hohenstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Georg, Hans.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of various places so named.
German: topographic name composed of Middle High German hōhen, an inflected form of hōch ‘high’ + stein ‘rock’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: North American: from the title originally adopted as a nickname parallel to Duke , King , etc. The title was used in England in Norman times as an equivalent of the French comte ‘count’ it is from Old English eorl ‘warrior, nobleman, prince’. In some cases the given name may have been taken from the surname Earl, which was originally either a nickname or a term denoting someone who worked in the household of an earl.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II, Count Honstein was born about 1226, in Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Saxony, Germany, his father, Dietrich I von Honstein, was 36 and his mother, Heilwig Sophie von Brehna, was 18. He married Mechtild von Regenstein in 1253. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 24 January 1284, at the age of 59.

fr.Hohnstein, Sachsen, Deutschland: Hohnstein, Kreis Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II, Count Honstein est né environ 1226, à Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich I von Honstein, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Heilwig Sophie von Brehna, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mechtild von Regenstein en 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1284, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.Hohnstein, Sachsen, Deutschland: Hohnstein, Kreis Sächsische Schweiz-Osterzgebirge, Sachsen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich II, Count Honstein um 1226 in Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich I von Honstein 36 und seine Mutter Heilwig Sophie von Brehna 18. Er hat 1253 Mechtild von Regenstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Januar 1284 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II, Count Honstein è nato il circa 1226 nel Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Dietrich I von Honstein, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Heilwig Sophie von Brehna, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mechtild von Regenstein nel 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 24 gennaio 1284, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.Hohnstein, Sachsen, Deutschland: 독일 작센 크레이스 스a크시슈 슈위즈-스터즈그비르지 호h스타인
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II, Count Honstein(이)가 대략 1226년 독일 작센 크레이스 피른아 호h스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich I von Honstein(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilwig Sophie von Brehna(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1253년 Mechtild von Regenstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 1월 24일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II, Count Honstein nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich I von Honstein, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Heilwig Sophie von Brehna, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mechtild von Regenstein em 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1284, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II, Count Honstein родился около 1226 г. в местности хохнстин, крис пирна, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Dietrich I von Honstein было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilwig Sophie von Brehna, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mechtild von Regenstein в 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 24 января 1284 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich II, Count Honstein nació aproximadamente 1226, en Hohnstein, Kreis Pirna, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Dietrich I von Honstein, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Heilwig Sophie von Brehna, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mechtild von Regenstein en 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 24 de enero de 1284, a la edad de 59 años.
